sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, string1 VARCHAR, string2 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, string1, string2) VALUES (1, 'duck', 'luck');
SELECT hamming(string1, string2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET string2 = 'dock' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hamming(string1, string2) AS new_distance FROM test_strings;
